log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Human — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Human — Bardic Musician HP: 23/67
